{{Quote|Good afternoon to ye. This be ''Ars Fivvle'' reportin' for 'Action Tidings.' |Ars Fivvle|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 57" />}}
'''Ars Fivvle''', sometimes called '''A.F.''', was an [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] of the [[Isced]] tribe who lived in the artificial [[City/Legends|city]] known as [[Ugnorgrad/Legends|Ugnorgrad]], one [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]] below [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].

==Biography==
{{Quote| 'Tis truly an honor to meet ''two Jedi'' on the same day. Do you mind me ''recordin{{'}}'' the meeting for my journal?|Ars Fivvle, to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="In the Air">{{TCWComicCite|6.14|In the Air}}</ref>}}
[[Fivvle|Ars Fivvle's father]] was the [[Foreman/Legends|foreman]] of a [[Republic mining outpost]] near [[Mirial/Legends|Mirial]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Ars was a successful [[Holojournalist/Legends|holojournalist]] for a media program known as ''[[Action Tidings]]''. Along with his cameraman, [[Pordimer]], Ars would record all significant events pertaining to the Ugnaught environs.

[[File:Ars_Fivvle_CW.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Ars Fivvle during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]]]
[[3 ABY/Legends|Three years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and his former aide, [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]], arrived in the [[Pleasant Meadow]] region near Ugnorgrad after having just lost a battle with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hugo Treece]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] administrator of Cloud City. Lando and Lobot boarded Ars' news [[floatboat]] and used the ''Action Tidings'' camera equipment to repel an attack from Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Ars and his crew later accompanied Lando back to Cloud City, where he was witness to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] coup led by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to remove Captain Treece from power.

This victory earned Ars tremendous renown amongst the holonews community and would eventually pave the way for Ars' promotion to the position of executive producer and anchorman emeritus of ''Action Tidings''. Ars' final official contribution to ''Action Tidings'' before retiring was an award-winning documentary entitled ''[[Ugnaughts' Progress]]'', which was rebroadcast throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

Upon retiring, Ars returned to his home on the [[Ugnaught Surface/Legends|Ugnaught Surface]] colony, where he attempted to pay off some of his [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] debts and keep pace with the Ars Fivvle Fan Club.
